name: Unifocus Hotel Workforce Management API
what_it_does: Unifocus hotel workforce management REST API for hospitality labor scheduling, time and attendance, productivity standards, and workforce analytics for hotels, resorts, and casinos. Enables AI agents to manage labor scheduling and demand-driven shift planning for hotel workforce cost optimization, handle time and attendance tracking with PMS occupancy-driven labor standards for productivity automation, access department-level labor budget vs actual variance reporting for hotel operations intelligence, retrieve productivity standard benchmarking by hotel department and labor category for workforce efficiency automation, manage labor compliance and overtime risk alerting for FLSA and state wage law management, handle manager schedule approval and labor budget sign-off workflow for labor governance automation, access labor forecasting and forward scheduling for hotel workforce planning, retrieve tipping and service charge reporting for associate pay compliance, manage multi-property portfolio labor analytics for hotel management company workforce intelligence, and integrate Unifocus with Oracle OPERA, Agilysys, ADP, Paycom, and M3 for full hospitality workforce ecosystem.
use_cases: Scheduling hotel staff from demand-driven workforce agents
Tracking labor efficiency from productivity analytics agents
Alerting overtime from wage compliance agents
Forecasting labor needs from workforce planning agents
not_for: Full payroll processing and tax compliance (use ADP or Paycom)
Restaurant and F&B scheduling as standalone (use HotSchedules or 7shifts)
best_when: A hotel, resort, or casino management company wanting AI agents to automate demand-driven labor scheduling, time and attendance, productivity variance analysis, labor compliance monitoring, and multi-property workforce analytics within Unifocus.
avoid_when: FLSA OVERTIME CALCULATION ACCURACY FOR AUTOMATED SCHEDULING: Automated scheduling via Unifocus must track weekly overtime threshold (40 hours FLSA) and daily overtime thresholds in California (8/12 hours) and Nevada (8/40 hours) for hospitality workers; automated schedule generation without jurisdiction-specific overtime calculation creates wage and hour liability. UNION COLLECTIVE BARGAINING AGREEMENT SCHEDULING RULES: Automated scheduling for unionized hotel workers (HERE Local unions common in hospitality) must comply with CBA scheduling minimums, call-in pay, shift differentials, and seniority-based shift selection; automated scheduling without CBA rule enforcement creates union grievance. PRODUCTIVITY STANDARD INJURY RISK IN AUTOMATED HOUSEKEEPING PLANNING: Automated housekeeping labor planning using Unifocus productivity standards must not systematically assign room quotas exceeding physically safe thresholds; aggressive automated productivity targets create repetitive strain injury and OSHA recordable exposure.

auth.notes: Unifocus uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. Dallas, Texas HQ. Founded 2000 by Mark Heymann. Private (PE-backed). Merged with TimeTec (workforce management) to strengthen portfolio. Hotel and resort workforce management focus. Casino and gaming property customers. OPERA and Agilysys PMS integration. Productivity standards library for 700+ job tasks. Competes with Hotel Effectiveness (Actabl), M3, and Infor Workforce for hotel labor management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-property annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-property subscription; scheduling, time and attendance, and analytics modules; casino and gaming tier available
pricing.notes: Dallas TX. Private PE-backed. Founded 2000. TimeTec merger. Hotel and casino workforce focus. Per-property annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; scheduling and attendance queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — ALL SCHEDULING AND ATTENDANCE EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Unifocus does not support native webhooks; automated labor scheduling optimization, overtime alerts, and PMS occupancy-driven labor guidance require scheduled polling aligned with hotel operational cycles (daily morning labor briefing)

UNION CBA SCHEDULING RULE ENFORCEMENT COMPLEXITY: Automated scheduling for unionized hotel workers must encode CBA scheduling rules (minimum shift duration, call-in pay, seniority shift selection, split shift premium); Unifocus scheduling rules engine must be configured with property-specific CBA requirements; automated scheduling without CBA rule validation creates union grievance and arbitration exposure

CALIFORNIA AND NEVADA DAILY OVERTIME CALCULATION: Automated scheduling for hotel properties in California (daily OT after 8 hours, double time after 12) and Nevada (daily OT after 8 hours in some situations) requires jurisdiction-specific daily overtime calculation in addition to FLSA weekly 40-hour threshold; automated scheduling using only FLSA 40-hour rule in CA/NV creates systematic wage and hour violation

PMS occupancy forecast freshness for scheduling accuracy — Unifocus labor demand calculation uses PMS occupancy forecast; automated scheduling based on stale occupancy forecast (before group pickup, before OTA availability update) creates over- or under-staffing; implement occupancy forecast freshness check before automated scheduling generation

Casino gaming floor labor jurisdiction complexity — casino hotel properties have dual labor pools: hotel staff (HERE union typically) and gaming floor staff (separate union or non-union); automated Unifocus scheduling for casino properties must correctly scope hotel vs gaming floor workforce; gaming floor scheduling may have separate regulatory requirements under state gaming board

Productivity standard calibration per property tier — Unifocus productivity standards library has 700+ job tasks with benchmark ranges; automated labor planning must calibrate standards to property tier (luxury vs economy), room configuration (suites vs standard), and occupancy type (resort fee leisure vs corporate transient); default industry standard without property calibration creates labor budget inaccuracy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hotel workforce management. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Employee scheduling, time, and payroll data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel labor management. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Employee scheduling and attendance data.
